title: November 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 24''' is the 328th day (329th on leap years) of the year. There are 37 days remaining in the year.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[John Alvin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Shirley Henderson]] is born.
*1965 – [[Darren Scott]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 75|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 75]] published.
*[[1985]] – ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' debuts on ABC.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 12|''Star Wars'' (1998) 12]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]] published.
*2004 – [[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett 4|''Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' 4]] published.
*2010 – ''[[Air Strike]]'' single-player online flash player game released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2012]] – "[[A Necessary Bond]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – "[[Gathering Forces]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Heir to the Jedi]]'' paperback published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes]]'' released.
*[[2019]] – "[[Rendezvous Point (episode)|Rendezvous Point]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 1 — Dark Heart of the Sith]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Vol. 1 — Galaxy's Deadliest]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[Life Day 1|''Life Day'' 1]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: Trail of Shadows 2|''The High Republic: Trail of Shadows'' 2]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 12|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 12]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures Annual 2021]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2022]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Modern Era Epic Collection: The Chosen One]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
